item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-10)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 42876 Trending skills: 21767 Hot skills: 3455 Top All Time: find-skills (480338) Top Trending: simple (19221) Top Hot: nano-banana (667)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): ai-content-pipeline
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 59 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Build multi-step AI content creation pipelines combining image, video, audio, and text. Workflow examples: generate image -> animate -> add voiceover -> merge with music. Tools: FLUX, Veo, Kokoro TTS, OmniHuman, media merger, upscaling. Use for: YouTube videos, social media content, marketing materials, automated content. Triggers: content pipeline, ai workflow, content creation, multi-step ai, content automation, ai video workflow, generate and edit, ai content factory, automated content creation, ai production pipeline, media pipeline, content at scale

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): ai-social-media-content
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 55 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Create AI-powered social media content for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter/X. Generate: images, videos, reels, shorts, thumbnails, captions, hashtags. Tools: FLUX, Veo, Seedance, Wan, Kokoro TTS, Claude for copywriting. Use for: content creators, social media managers, influencers, brands. Triggers: social media content, tiktok, instagram reels, youtube shorts, twitter post, content creator, ai influencer, social content, reels, shorts, viral content, thumbnail generator, caption generator, hashtag generator, ugc content

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): web-design-guidelines
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 145 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): frontend-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 20 Source: anthropics/claude-code Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): executing-plans
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 44 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): using-superpowers
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 47 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): verification-before-completion
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 38 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): ai-image-generation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 667 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Generate AI images with FLUX, Gemini, Grok, Seedream, Reve and 50+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: FLUX Dev LoRA, FLUX.2 Klein LoRA, Gemini 3 Pro Image, Grok Imagine, Seedream 4.5, Reve, ImagineArt. Capabilities: text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, LoRA, image editing, upscaling, text rendering. Use for: AI art, product mockups, concept art, social media graphics, marketing visuals, illustrations. Triggers: flux, image generation, ai image, text to image, stable diffusion, generate image, ai art, midjourney alternative, dall-e alternative, text2img, t2i, image generator, ai picture, create image with ai, generative ai, ai illustration, grok image, gemini image

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): python-executor
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 99 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Execute Python code in a safe sandboxed environment via [inference.sh](https://inference.sh). Pre-installed: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, requests, BeautifulSoup, Selenium, Playwright, MoviePy, Pillow, OpenCV, trimesh, and 100+ more libraries. Use for: data processing, web scraping, image manipulation, video creation, 3D model processing, PDF generation, API calls, automation scripts. Triggers: python, execute code, run script, web scraping, data analysis, image processing, video editing, 3D models, automation, pandas, matplotlib

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): python-sdk
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 90 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Python SDK for inference.sh - run AI apps, build agents, and integrate with 150+ models. Package: inferencesh (pip install inferencesh). Supports sync/async, streaming, file uploads. Build agents with template or ad-hoc patterns, tool builder API, skills, and human approval. Use for: Python integration, AI apps, agent development, RAG pipelines, automation. Triggers: python sdk, inferencesh, pip install, python api, python client, async inference, python agent, tool builder python, programmatic ai, python integration, sdk python

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): systematic-debugging
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 57 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): deploy-to-vercel
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 48 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: Deploy applications and websites to Vercel. Use when the user requests deployment actions like "deploy my app", "deploy and give me the link", "push this live", or "create a preview deployment".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): self-improving-agent
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 44 Source: charon-fan/agent-playbook Description: A universal self-improving agent that learns from ALL skill experiences. Uses multi-memory architecture (semantic + episodic + working) to continuously evolve the codebase. Auto-triggers on skill completion/error with hooks-based self-correction.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): google-veo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 55 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Generate videos with Google Veo models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Veo 3.1, Veo 3.1 Fast, Veo 3, Veo 3 Fast, Veo 2. Capabilities: text-to-video, cinematic output, high quality video generation. Triggers: veo, google veo, veo 3, veo 2, veo 3.1, vertex ai video, google video generation, google video ai, veo model, veo video

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): requesting-code-review
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 44 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): tavily-search
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 23 Source: veithly/tavily-search Description: Tavily AI search API - Optimized search for AI agents. Use when searching the web for current information, news, facts, or any task requiring real-time data.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): landing-page-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 48 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Landing page conversion optimization with layout rules, hero section design, and CTA psychology. Covers above-the-fold formula, social proof placement, mobile design, and F-pattern reading. Use for: startup landing pages, product pages, SaaS marketing, conversion optimization. Triggers: landing page, hero section, above the fold, conversion optimization, landing page design, cta button, hero image, landing page layout, saas landing page, product page design, conversion rate, landing page best practices

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): marketing-psychology
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 41 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to apply psychological principles, mental models, or behavioral science to marketing. Also use when the user mentions 'psychology,' 'mental models,' 'cognitive bias,' 'persuasion,' 'behavioral science,' 'why people buy,' 'decision-making,' or 'consumer behavior.' This skill provides 70+ mental models organized for marketing application.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): self-improvement
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 40 Source: pskoett/self-improving-agent Description: Captures learnings, errors, and corrections to enable continuous improvement. Use when: (1) A command or operation fails unexpectedly, (2) User corrects Claude ('No, that's wrong...', 'Actually...'), (3) User requests a capability that doesn't exist, (4) An external API or tool fails, (5) Claude realizes its knowledge is outdated or incorrect, (6) A better approach is discovered for a recurring task. Also review learnings before major tasks.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): subagent-driven-development
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 34 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): writing-skills
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 31 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): using-git-worktrees
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 30 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans - creates isolated git worktrees with smart directory selection and safety verification

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): dispatching-parallel-agents
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 30 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): agent-browser
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 15 Source: browserbase/agent-browser Description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): case-study-writing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 62 Source: toolshell/skills Description: B2B case study writing with STAR framework, data visualization, and research. Covers structure, customer quotes, metrics presentation, and distribution formats. Use for: customer success stories, portfolio pieces, sales enablement, marketing content. Triggers: case study, customer story, success story, b2b case study, client testimonial, customer case study, portfolio case study, use case, customer win, results story

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): video-prompting-guide
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 48 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Best practices and techniques for writing effective AI video generation prompts. Covers: Veo, Seedance, Wan, Grok, Kling, Runway, Pika, Sora prompting strategies. Learn: shot types, camera movements, lighting, pacing, style keywords, negative prompts. Use for: improving video quality, getting consistent results, professional video prompts. Triggers: video prompt, how to prompt video, veo prompts, video generation tips, better ai video, video prompt engineering, video prompt guide, video prompt template, ai video tips, video prompt best practices, video prompt examples, cinematography prompts

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): app-store-screenshots
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 24 Source: parthjadhav/app-store-screenshots Description: Use when building App Store screenshot pages, generating exportable marketing screenshots for iOS apps, or creating programmatic screenshot generators with Next.js. Triggers on app store, screenshots, marketing assets, html-to-image, phone mockup.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): ai-automation-workflows
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 48 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Build automated AI workflows combining multiple models and services. Patterns: batch processing, scheduled tasks, event-driven pipelines, agent loops. Tools: inference.sh CLI, bash scripting, Python SDK, webhook integration. Use for: content automation, data processing, monitoring, scheduled generation. Triggers: ai automation, workflow automation, batch processing, ai pipeline, automated content, scheduled ai, ai cron, ai batch job, automated generation, ai workflow, content at scale, automation script, ai orchestration

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): test-driven-development
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 47 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): gws-gmail
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 34 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Send, read, and manage email.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): daily-news-caster
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 13 Source: noizai/skills Description: Fetches the latest news using news-aggregator-skill, formats it into a podcast script in Markdown format, and uses the tts skill to generate a podcast audio file. Use when the user asks to get the latest news and read it out as a podcast.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): content-strategy
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 38 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to plan a content strategy, decide what content to create, or figure out what topics to cover. Also use when the user mentions "content strategy," "what should I write about," "content ideas," "blog strategy," "topic clusters," or "content planning." For writing individual pieces, see copywriting. For SEO-specific audits, see seo-audit.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): xiaohongshu-note-analyzer
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 15 Source: softbread/xiaohongshu-doctor Description: 全面分析小红书笔记的内容质量、关键词优化、标题吸引力、敏感内容风险、商业化程度、互动潜力等。适用于发布前审核、内容优化建议、提升笔记曝光率。触发词包括"分析小红书笔记"、"小红书内容审核"、"笔记优化"、"XHS分析"，或上传小红书笔记内容请求分析。

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): xiaohongshu-images
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 12 Source: iamzifei/xiaohongshu-images-skill Description: Transform markdown/HTML into styled 3:4 ratio images for Xiaohongshu

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): chat-with-anyone
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 11 Source: noizai/skills Description: Chat with any real person or fictional character in their own voice by automatically finding their speech online, extracting a clean reference sample, and generating audio replies. Use when the user says "我想跟xxx聊天", "你来扮演xxx跟我说话", "让xxx给我讲讲这篇文章", or similar.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): video-translation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 11 Source: noizai/skills Description: Translate and dub videos from one language to another, replacing the original audio with TTS while keeping the video intact.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#6): vercel-react-native-skills
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #6 Installs: 62 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React Native and Expo best practices for building performant mobile apps. Use when building React Native components, optimizing list performance, implementing animations, or working with native modules. Triggers on tasks involving React Native, Expo, mobile performance, or native platform APIs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#7): gws-gmail-forward
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #7 Installs: 22 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Forward a message to new recipients.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#8): gws-gmail-reply-all
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #8 Installs: 22 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Reply-all to a message (handles threading automatically).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#9): writing-plans
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #9 Installs: 53 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (25 → 43): frontend-design
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #25 Current rank: #43 Delta: -18 Installs: 14 (prev 20) Source: mager/frontend-design Description: Frontend design skill that generates, restyles, and guides UI development in mager's signature aesthetic — hot, sleek, sexy, usable, fun, and addictive interfaces with dark-first themes, terminal-inspired typography, neon accents, and visual discovery patterns. Use this skill when building or reviewing any frontend UI.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (4 → 16): remotion-render
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #4 Current rank: #16 Delta: -12 Installs: 641 (prev 338) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Render videos from React/Remotion component code via inference.sh. Pass TSX code, get MP4. Supports all Remotion APIs: useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig, spring, interpolate, AbsoluteFill, Sequence. Configurable resolution, FPS, duration, codec. Use for: programmatic video generation, animated graphics, motion design, data-driven videos, React animations to video. Triggers: remotion, render video from code, tsx to video, react video, programmatic video, remotion render, code to video, animated video, motion graphics code, react animation video

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (6 → 10): agent-browser
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #6 Current rank: #10 Delta: -4 Installs: 112 (prev 122) Source: vercel-labs/agent-browser Description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (17 → 3): chat-ui
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #17 Current rank: #3 Delta: +14 Installs: 104 (prev 45) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Chat UI building blocks for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. Components: container, messages, input, typing indicators, avatars. Capabilities: chat interfaces, message lists, input handling, streaming. Use for: building custom chat UIs, messaging interfaces, AI assistants. Triggers: chat ui, chat component, message list, chat input, shadcn chat, react chat, chat interface, messaging ui, conversation ui, chat building blocks

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (39 → 5): gws-gmail-reply
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #39 Current rank: #5 Delta: +34 Installs: 23 (prev 10) Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Reply to a message (handles threading automatically).

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (42 → 29): press-release-writing
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #42 Current rank: #29 Delta: +13 Installs: 58 (prev 31) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Press release writing in AP style with inverted pyramid structure. Covers formatting, datelines, quotes, boilerplates, and fact-checking. Use for: product launches, funding announcements, partnerships, company news, events. Triggers: press release, pr writing, media release, news release, announcement, product launch announcement, funding announcement, company news, media advisory, ap style, press statement, news wire

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (5 → 1): nano-banana
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #5 Current rank: #1 Delta: +4 Installs: 667 (prev 335) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Generate images with Google Gemini native image models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Gemini 3 Pro Image, Gemini 2.5 Flash Image. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, multi-image input. Triggers: nano banana, gemini image, gemini 3 pro image, gemini 2.5 flash image, google image generation, native image generation, gemini native image

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (4 → 6): agent-browser
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #4 Current rank: #6 Delta: -2 Installs: 11204 (prev 11239) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Browser automation for AI agents via inference.sh. Navigate web pages, interact with elements using @e refs, take screenshots, record video. Capabilities: web scraping, form filling, clicking, typing, drag-drop, file upload, JavaScript execution. Use for: web automation, data extraction, testing, agent browsing, research. Triggers: browser, web automation, scrape, navigate, click, fill form, screenshot, browse web, playwright, headless browser, web agent, surf internet, record video

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (5 → 8): ai-video-generation
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #5 Current rank: #8 Delta: -3 Installs: 11167 (prev 11235) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Generate AI videos with Google Veo, Seedance, Wan, Grok and 40+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Veo 3.1, Veo 3, Seedance 1.5 Pro, Wan 2.5, Grok Imagine Video, OmniHuman, Fabric, HunyuanVideo. Capabilities: text-to-video, image-to-video, lipsync, avatar animation, video upscaling, foley sound. Use for: social media videos, marketing content, explainer videos, product demos, AI avatars. Triggers: video generation, ai video, text to video, image to video, veo, animate image, video from image, ai animation, video generator, generate video, t2v, i2v, ai video maker, create video with ai, runway alternative, pika alternative, sora alternative, kling alternative

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (7 → 10): agent-tools
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #7 Current rank: #10 Delta: -3 Installs: 11092 (prev 11094) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. Models: FLUX, Veo, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Seedance, OmniHuman, Tavily, Exa, OpenRouter, and many more. Use when running AI apps, generating images/videos, calling LLMs, web search, or automating Twitter. Triggers: inference.sh, infsh, ai model, run ai, serverless ai, ai api, flux, veo, claude api, image generation, video generation, openrouter, tavily, exa search, twitter api, grok
